project_privacy_data_flows.description: User submits donation via Google Pay. Personal information (name, email, address) and payment token sent to Wikimedia fundraising API.

flow_steps.details: User initiates donation via Google Pay. Google Pay API provides encrypted payment token.

flow_steps.code: @GET("api.php?format=json&action=getPaymentMethods") suspend fun getPaymentMethods(@Query("country") country: String): PaymentResponseContainer
flow_steps.details: User's country sent to get available payment methods from Wikimedia fundraising API.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST("api.php?format=json&action=submitPayment") suspend fun submitPayment(@Field("amount") amount: String, @Field("currency") currency: String, @Field("email") email: String, @Field("full_name") fullName: String, @Field("street_address") streetAddress: String, @Field("city") city: String, @Field("state_province") stateProvince: String, @Field("postal_code") postalCode: String, @Field("country") country: String, @Field("payment_token") paymentToken: String, @Field("opt_in") optIn: String, @Field("payment_network") paymentNetwork: String, ...)
flow_steps.details: Donation details sent to Wikimedia fundraising API. Includes: amount, currency, email, full name, street address, city, state, postal code, country, Google Pay payment token, opt-in status, payment network info, donor country, language, app version, and banner context. Also includes app_install_id for analytics.
Donation funnel events (impression, submit, success, failure) logged to Event Platform.

project_privacy_data_flows.description: Donation campaign configuration fetched based on user's GeoIP country. Cookie-based GeoIP detection determines what donation campaign to show.

flow_steps.details: GeoIP cookie read to determine user's country for donation campaign targeting.
Donation campaign data fetched from server based on user's country.
